extracts.extract: Innovation that you can do around things like this is just as valuable around the process as around the output. Incremental improvement is also valuable.
extracts.chapter: Same as it ever was? New approaches to the same old data
extracts.relevance_rationale: Valuing process innovation and incremental improvement is a durable mindset for any technology era

extracts.extract: In a breaking news situation: Keep a level head. Take a deep breath. Stop. Call a meeting. Talk it out with people you respect. Think creatively. Be open to possibilities — don't form preconceived ideas of what the story is.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Keeping a level head and avoiding preconceptions during breaking news is timeless editorial judgment

extracts.extract: Build Tools When it's Quiet. List potential disasters. Keep a log of what you're doing. How-to, both to justify for story and reproduce.
extracts.relevance_rationale: LLMs can now accelerate pre-building tools and generating documentation templates for breaking news preparedness

extracts.extract: Build methodology as you do it. Data diaries. Starting at the beginning makes it doable.
extracts.chapter: When and How Data Journalists Disclose Their Methods
extracts.relevance_rationale: LLM-assisted logging and documentation tools can now automate parts of methodology tracking and data diaries

extracts.extract: Make sure someone else looks at your work, hopefully inside your organization. We won't release without extensive bullet-proofing and fact-checking.
extracts.chapter: When and How Data Journalists Disclose Their Methods
extracts.relevance_rationale: Peer review and bulletproofing before publication is a non-negotiable verification practice regardless of AI tools
